name: pr-comment-fix
description: Fetch, analyze, fix, verify, resolve, and re-request review for PR comments with script-backed multi-agent pipeline
help: Provide a GitHub/GitLab PR URL. The skill runs a 13-stage pipeline (0-12) using gh CLI for API calls and parallel review agents.
author: Insight Agent

skills.name: pr-comment-fix
skills.description: Fix PR comments with detailed logging and confirmation steps

features: fetch-pr-comments.sh — paginated gh CLI with 3 comment types
rollback.sh — safe local revert of fix commits
CHANGES_REQUESTED tracking — blocking comment status through pipeline
Parallel multi-agent review with ECC integration
User confirmation at critical decision points
DRY_RUN mode for testing without side effects
